subtasks.description: Generate SQL query to fetch top 5 publishers by spend in Q4 2024 (Oct-Dec 2024), returning publisher name, total spend, transaction count, and any relevant vendor metrics

Reconcile Q4 2024 spend data with publisher contract status, SLA compliance, renewal dates, and historical trends. Classify each publisher as at-risk or low-risk based on spend concentration, contract expiration, performance issues, and market volatility. Generate SAM team summary with risk flags and recommendations

plan.cost_rationale: Two subtasks required: (1) sql_gen (mid tier) because the query needs to aggregate spend across multiple transactions in Q4 2024, likely joining spend/transaction tables with publisher reference data; (2) cross_recon (mid tier) to assess risk by reconciling the spend output with contract status, renewal schedules, and compliance data. Risk classification and SAM-ready summarization are part of the reconciliation step, not separate policy_action (no explicit governance policy check requested). Both mid tier sufficient as the SQL involves standard aggregation and grouping, and cross_recon involves multi-signal analysis but no complex inference. No single-source lookup or multi-tool registry call needed.

output.sql: SELECT cf.publisher, SUM(cf.amount_usd) AS total_spend, COUNT(cf.event_id) AS transaction_count, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.license_id) AS unique_licenses, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id) AS unique_users, AVG(cf.daily_active_seats) AS avg_daily_active_seats, MIN(cf.event_date) AS first_transaction_date, MAX(cf.event_date) AS last_transaction_date FROM consumption_facts cf WHERE cf.event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND cf.event_date <= '2024-12-31' AND cf.fiscal_quarter = 4 AND cf.fiscal_year = 2024 GROUP BY cf.publisher ORDER BY total_spend DESC LIMIT 5
